intended_use_full: The intended use of the device YSIO X.pree is to visualize anatomical structures of human beings by converting an X-ray pattern into a visible image. The device is a digital X-ray system to generate X-ray images from the whole body including the skull, chest, abdomen, and extremities. The acquired images support medical professionals to make diagnostic and/or therapeutic decisions. YSIO X.pree is not for mammography examinations.
ground_truth: US board-certified radiologist assessment for new detector X.wi-D24 image quality evaluation
other_metrics: Detector performance metrics reported including DQE (Detective Quantum Efficiency) values ranging from 14-70% across spatial frequencies, MTF (Modulation Transfer Function) values ranging from 10-84%, maximum resolution of 5 lp/mm, sensitivity of 450/560/680 lsb/µGy, electronic noise of 8.2 lsb, and maximal linear dose range of 50 µGy
